full_text:
Qi Zheng (Lingxian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qi Zheng, styledLingxian. Avoided disaster by remaining neutral towards Huang Hao. Qi Zheng was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
